3225840.name: Wilderness
3225840.description: This game takes you into a vibrant world where many players transform into little snakes, competing and growing on a vast map. Starting from an insignificant length, these snakes gradually increase in size by devouring colorful spheres scattered around them. Players must operate with caution to avoid collisions with other players or map edges, which will end their game. The virtual joystick in the bottom left corner allows for flexible directional changes, enabling strategic maneuvers around opponents and attempting to collide them with your body. Every time I eat a ball, it adds endless fun to this journey of growth. As the snake grows larger, its speed will decrease, and players need to carefully plan their path to prevent being chased or surrounded by faster snakes.
